MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication; **Court Reporter Fees Paid**
Off Calendar Oct-21-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Ginger L. Sotelo; Pahl & McCay; 408-286-5100; appearing via Zoom on behalf of plaintiff Equity Residential Management, LLC.
Michael A. Mazzocone; 415-399-0800; appearing in person on behalf of defendant and cross-complainant Pazzia, Inc.

Plaintiff contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED. Triable issues of material fact 3, 12, 21, 27. The Court further notes that it is unclear from the Notice of Motion whether Plaintiff is seeking Summary Judgment on both the Complaint and Cross-Complaint, while the alternative relief for Summary Adjudication clearly covers both. Summary Judgment motion is framed by the pleadings and the Court cannot adjudicate partial causes of action (except for issues that are not applicable here). The first cause of action in the Cross-Complaint is based, inter alia, on the following allegations that are not addressed by the moving party: "[Landlord] has further breached the contract and the covenant of good faith and fair dealing by agreeing to accept a percentage of the rent and thereafter reneging on the amount it was willing to accept. It has further breached the covenant of good faith and fair dealing by refusing to negotiate payments with Pazzia unless Pazzia paid it additional amounts that Pazzia did not agree to pay after the onset of the pandemic and the closure ordered by the Governor of California." Therefore, moving party failed to shift its burden on the first cause of action in the Cross-Complaint both for the purposed of summary judgment (assuming summary judgment was sought on the cross-complaint) and on the summary adjudication.

Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
